_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: no differences in brainstem or neocortex microglia numbers were observed at 3 weeks, 6 weeks or 3 months of age between Nf1+/- mice and their WT littermates
details: Show spatially-restricted microglia increase only in optic nerve, not in brainstem or neocortex
